name: cursor-image-trail
title: Cursor Image Trail
author: Parable
description: A hover region that leaves a trail of images chasing the cursor — images from a pool pop in at pointer positions (throttled by distance) and fade/scale out a moment later, driven by a single rAF loop over a recycled pool of nodes with zero per-frame React state. Under prefers-reduced-motion the trail is disabled entirely and only the children render.
